scenarios.description: appendChild(reparenting) removes a non-last child from an old parent with multiple children and shifts siblingIndex of remaining
scenarios.precondition: oldParent has two children, childToMove is the first child
scenarios.expectedResult: oldParent.childNodeSize() decrements by 1, remaining child's siblingIndex updates, newParent.childNodeSize() is 1, moved child's siblingIndex is 0

scenarios.description: appendChild(Element) on a fresh parent allocates a new NodeList and sets siblingIndex on Element child
scenarios.precondition: parent has no children and child is an Element
scenarios.expectedResult: parent.childNodeSize() becomes 1, child.siblingIndex() is 0, and parent.appendChild returns parent
pseudocode: TEST TC07 appendChild with Element child
